title: WPC Baffle Ceiling
shortDescription: Premium WPC Baffle Ceiling system. Get a modern, open ceiling look that is 100% waterproof, termite-proof, and easy to maintain for luxury offices and homes in Delhi NCR.
longDescription:
Transform your ceiling into a modern architectural masterpiece with Goals Floors' WPC Baffle Ceilings. Perfect for luxury offices in Cyber City and premium homes in Delhi NCR, these linear panels give your space a highly professional, open, and spacious look.

Unlike traditional POP or gypsum ceilings that get damaged by water and require regular painting, our WPC (Wood Plastic Composite) baffles are 100% waterproof, termite-proof, and require zero painting. They are installed using a smart hidden-clip system, which means no ugly screws are visible. This open design also makes it incredibly easy to hide AC ducts, wires, and fire pipes above the ceiling while keeping them completely accessible for future maintenance.

features.title: Premium Wood Look (A+ Grade)
features.description: It looks exactly like expensive natural wood but is made from advanced composite materials, giving you the best of both worlds.

features.title: 100% Waterproof & Termite Proof
features.description: Completely safe from water damage, roof dampness (seelan), and termites (deemak). It will never rot, swell, or bend.

features.title: Hides Wires & AC Ducts Perfectly
features.description: The open linear design is perfect for hiding ugly ceiling wires, pipes, and AC ducts while keeping them easy to reach for repairs.

features.title: Easy Light Integration
features.description: You can easily fit beautiful hanging lights, modern LED profiles, or spot lights between the ceiling panels for a stunning look.

features.title: Zero Maintenance Needed
features.description: It requires absolutely no painting or polishing. Just wipe the dust away to keep it looking brand new for years.

features.title: Reduces Room Echo
features.description: The unique vertical shape of the baffles helps in breaking sound waves, making large offices and living rooms quieter and more comfortable.

installation: Installation is fast and professional. A strong metal frame (GI channel) is installed on the roof. The WPC Baffles are then easily snapped into specialized hidden carrier clips. This means there are no visible screws or nails, giving your ceiling a perfectly clean and premium architectural finish.
maintenance: It is virtually maintenance-free. To clean it, simply use a feather duster or a vacuum with a soft brush attachment. For any accidental stains, wiping it with a slightly damp cloth is more than enough.

faqs.question: What exactly is a WPC Baffle Ceiling?
faqs.answer: A baffle ceiling is a modern design made of vertical, wooden-looking panels hanging from a frame. It gives the room a deep, open look and is very popular in luxury offices and cafes.

faqs.question: Is it made of real natural wood?
faqs.answer: No, it is made of WPC (Wood Plastic Composite). This means it looks and feels exactly like premium wood but is 100% waterproof and termite-proof.

faqs.question: Can I use it to hide my AC ducts and ceiling wires?
faqs.answer: Yes! This is one of the main reasons architects love baffle ceilings. It hides the messy AC ducts and wires while keeping the space open so mechanics can easily reach them for repairs.

faqs.question: Do I need to paint or polish these baffles?
faqs.answer: Not at all. The panels come pre-finished in beautiful wood textures. You save a lot of time and money because they require zero painting or polishing.

faqs.question: How do I clean the ceiling?
faqs.answer: Cleaning is very simple. Because the surface is smooth, you can just use a feather duster or a dry mop to wipe away any dust.

faqs.question: Is it safe from fire?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our WPC material is manufactured with Class B1 fire-retardant properties. It does not help spread fire, making it very safe for commercial buildings and homes.

faqs.question: Can I install lights in this type of ceiling?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Modern hanging lights, linear LED profiles, and spot lights fit perfectly between the gaps of the baffles, giving a very luxurious lighting effect.

faqs.question: Does it make the room quieter?
faqs.answer: Yes. The vertical shape of the baffles breaks sound waves. This acts as an acoustic diffuser, which helps in reducing echo in large offices or living rooms.

faqs.question: How is it installed?
faqs.answer: It is hung from the roof using a strong galvanized metal frame. The baffles simply snap into hidden clips, so no messy cement or ugly screws are visible.

faqs.question: Do you supply this for large offices in Gurugram and Noida?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors is a major B2B supplier. We offer special volume discounts and ready stocks for interior designers, architects, and contractors across Delhi NCR.

installationSteps.title: Leveling & Layout
points: Use a laser tool to mark a perfectly straight ceiling level.
Plan the direction you want the baffles to face.
Decide the gap or spacing you want between each baffle.
installationSteps.tip: A standard 100mm gap between panels gives the most balanced and professional look.

installationSteps.title: Install the Metal Grid
points: Securely install the galvanized metal (GI) main channels to the roof.
Attach the specialized hidden carrier clips to this metal grid.
Check with a leveler to ensure the entire grid is completely flat.
installationSteps.tip: Always use high-quality expansion bolts into the concrete roof for maximum safety.

installationSteps.title: Snap and Lock
points: Simply align the WPC baffles with the teeth of the carrier clips.
Push them upwards firmly until you hear a 'lock' click.
If needed, easily trim the edges with a normal wood saw for a perfect fit.
